CVE-2013-1988.title: Multiple integer overflows in X.org libXRes 1.0.6 and earlier all ...
CVE-2013-1988.description: Multiple integer overflows in X.org libXRes 1.0.6 and earlier allow X servers to trigger allocation of insufficient memory and a buffer overflow via vectors related to the (1) XResQueryClients and (2) XResQueryClientResources functions.
